.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update the Java version in the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the build job.
Update the Java version in the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the test job.
Update the Java version in the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the Gradle build job.

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CodeQL analysis workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Update the Java version used in the Maven Central Repository setup step to Java 21.
Update the Java version used in the Publish package setup step to Java 21.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation in Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and is not present in Java 21; code using these annotations will fail to compile or run without an explicit dependency on the Jakarta replacement.

core/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/va.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with the new List.getFirst() method introduced in Java 21.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ API modernization.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migration to Path.of().

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace legacy instanceof check with pattern matching to eliminate explicit casting.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.before: if (element instanceof Rule) { return prettify((Rule) element); }
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.after: if (element instanceof Rule rule) { return prettify(rule); }

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI-based URL creation to comply with Java 21 security restrictions.
plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.why_exists: java.net.URL(String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21 and throws IllegalArgumentException for certain protocols or is restricted by security managers; using URI.create().toURL() is the required modern approach.

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting JDK 21 or lack support for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled for JDK 21 due to class file version incompatibilities.

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.general_idea: Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to simplify code and remove unchecked cast warning.
server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.after:
if (elementInstance instanceof DrgElement element) {
            return element;

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner variable extraction.
validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.after: if (sourceElement instanceof Decision sourceDecision && targetElement instanceof Decision targetDecision) {

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace the explicit filter-and-map pattern for Optional with the more concise flatMap-Optional-stream idiom.

validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line string literals.
validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.before: final String expectedErrorMessage = "Could not parse '[1..': line 1, column 5:\n" + "INTEGER, DECIMAL, booleanfragment, variablefragment, stringfragment or date and time(\" expected, EOF encountered.";
validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.after: final String expectedErrorMessage = """ Could not parse '[1..': line 1, column 5: INTEGER, DECIMAL, booleanfragment, variablefragment, stringfragment or date and time(\" expected, EOF encountered.""";
